source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, body text, labels, and metric-heavy ecosystem dashboards.
layout: Modular 8px product grids, reef-branch groupings, aqua navigation rails, shell surfaces, lively status chips, and controlled coral texture.

prompts.label: Transparent coral reef motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Coral Reef transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a reef ecosystem motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact tropical coral reef ecosystem cluster with branching coral-orange forms, shell-cream coral heads, aqua-blue water reflections, lagoon-cyan highlights, small sea-grass green elements, reef shadow crevices, and biodiversity texture. It must read as coral reef ecosystem, not single coral branch, aquarium decoration, flower bouquet, or abstract blobs.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include coral branches, reef base, small ecosystem details, and water-reflection color without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full underwater scene background, no large fish subject, no scuba diver, no aquarium glass, no plastic decoration look, no props, no text, no watermark.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Coral Reef light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Coral Reef", derived from the visible reef ecosystem cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Coral Reef, Reef Ecosystem, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from coral-orange branches, aqua-blue water, lagoon-cyan highlights, shell-cream surfaces, sea-grass green signals, sand-shell neutrals, and deep reef shadows. The board must read as coral reef ecosystem, not generic ocean, jellyfish, or single coral branch.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible while controlling the vibrant palette.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: vibrant ecosystem product system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, shell-cream surfaces, coral-orange primary actions, aqua-blue navigation, lagoon-cyan focus rings, sea-grass success, reef-branch dividers, controlled coral texture, modular dashboard clusters.
Constraints: no jellyfish theme, no generic blue ocean app, no plastic aquarium decoration, no unrelated saturated colors beyond reef palette, no generic purple gradients, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Coral Reef", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Coral Reef dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Coral Reef". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible reef ecosystem cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Coral Reef, Reef Ecosystem, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same coral reef system language as the visible light board: deep-reef panels, shell-cream text, coral-orange actions, aqua-blue navigation, lagoon-cyan focus, sea-grass status, reef-branch texture, modular ecosystem component clusters, and precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on dark reef surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep reef and shadow-blue backgrounds, shell text, coral-orange active states, aqua charts, cyan focus rings, sea-grass success, subtle coral texture overlays, crisp 8px cards and tables.
Constraints: no jellyfish, no generic ocean-only theme, no neon nightclub reef, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Coral Reef", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
